description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile red sports car with a streamlined aerodynamic body and aggressive styling. The car features a sharply contoured hood, large black-tinted windshield, and side mirrors mounted on thin stalks. Its side profile reveals sculpted doors, prominent wheel arches, and black five-spoke alloy wheels with low-profile tires. The rear of the car is characterized by a wide stance, integrated taillights, and a subtle rear diffuser, with no visible spoiler. The roof and window area are finished in black, contrasting with the vibrant red bodywork. The overall design suggests high performance and luxury, typical of modern supercars.
description: A striking red sports car with a low, aerodynamic body, black roof, and five-spoke alloy wheels. Its sculpted lines and aggressive stance highlight its high-performance design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sharply contoured hood, wide black windshield, and aggressive front fascia.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sculpted doors, prominent wheel arches, and five-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide stance, integrated taillights, and rear diffuser, with no visible spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the aerodynamic profile and wheel design.
